text: The word used in the Hebrew text means ‘ruthlessness’, but is perhaps a false reading for the very similar word meaning ‘diligence’ (cf. 10.4).

In the second half of the verse, the text is possibly corrupt; as it stands, it should mean either that the wise man takes other people’s lives, or that he receives the persons of others as his captives (Gen. 14.14, 21). The exact sense is not clear.
